name: Remote Access
description: Mirror your open TEDI terminals to a browser anywhere, via your self-hosted relay. Toggle with Ctrl+Alt+R.
author: IlhamriSKY

settings.label: Enable remote access
settings.description: Spawn the agent that mirrors your open terminals to the relay while TEDI is running.

settings.label: Relay URL
settings.description: Your own relay's agent WebSocket endpoint, e.g. wss://your-domain/agent.

settings.label: Agent token
settings.description: Must equal AGENT_TOKEN configured on the relay.

settings.label: Host label
settings.description: Name shown to the browser client.
